rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: None required for input ingestion; continue to ensure the Inputs sheet uses single-source cell references to avoid duplicated hard-coded values.
rubric_item_scores.notes: All required per-measure inputs (capex, annual_tCO2e, annual_opex_savings) are present in the normalized outputs. Missing discount rate is explicitly flagged as 'needs_review' and a documented default (base_discount_rate = 0.05) is present in the output metadata.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: All required per-measure inputs (capex, annual_tCO2e, annual_opex_savings) are present in the normalized outputs. rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Document explicitly in the Assumptions sheet that the base_discount_rate = 5% was assumed because the packet omitted a discount rate (the workbook already flags needs_review).
rubric_item_scores.notes: Calculations are internally consistent: five_year_abatement = annual_tCO2e * 5, pv_savings = annuity_factor * annual_opex_savings (annuity_factor matches 5-year factor at 5%), net_abatement_cost = CAPEX - PV(savings), and net_cost_per_tCO2e = net_abatement_cost / (5-year abatement). Values in measure_results match these formulas.

Values in measure_results match these formulas.
